form.formComment: Back from a spell. Finished off last preparation second last in a small field at Cristal December 18 over 1200m, 10 len behind Qualidade Total carrying 54kg at $12.80. Previously first up; ran last of 8 at Cristal November 8 over 1100m, 18 len behind Hora Crop carrying 57kg at $4.60. Marginal prospect.

form.formComment: Form hard to fault. Comes here off a 36-day let-up. Last start 2nd of 11 at this track on March 2 over 1000m, on heavy track; 2.25 len behind Admiral Speed with 57kg at $5.90. The start before that 4th of 9 at this track on February 9 over 1000m, 6 len behind Numbat carrying 57kg at $6. Another bold run is expected.
